titleStmt.title: SII 17.275: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 275. (A.R. No. 250 of 1904). TIRUMALAI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the first prākāra of the Veṅkaṭēśa Perumāḷ temple.
The details of date given, viz., Śaka 1389, Sarvajit, Mīna, ba. 7, Wednesday, Mūlam regularly correspond to 1468 A.D., March 16, Wednesday, ·45; ·43.

This records an undertaking by the sthānattār in Tirumalai given to Narasiṅgayyadēva-mahārāja, son of Guṇḍaiyadēva-mahārāja, to provide for the food offerings during the 30 sandhis for god Tiruvēṅgaḍamuḍaiyāṉ, from the income of the five villages, Vañjipākkam, Mallimālai, Śē[lai]kkūr and Bhīmapuram in Kīḻaippaḍai-nāḍu in Chandragiri-Rājyam and Vāḷālmaṇkoṇḍāṉ in Paḍavīṭṭil-śīmai, granted by the latter for his own merit and also for the distribution of the food offerings, as stipulated, especially to a choultry under the administration of Astigiri Ayyaṉ, built by the donor for his own merit.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The published text of this inscription in Tirumalai Tirupati Devasthanam Epigraphical Series, Vol. II, No. 34, contains some mistakes.
div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . śakābdam Āyirattumuṉṉūṟṟu Eṇpattu Oṉpatiṉmel cellāniṉṟa sarvvacit samvatsarattu minanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu sabdamiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ śrīmaṉmahāmaṇṭaleśvara metiṉimīcarakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri
cāḷuva cāḷuvakuṇṭaiyyā tevamahārācauṭaiyar kumārar naraciṅkayya tevamahārāca Uṭaiyaṟku tirumalaiyil stāṉattararom śilāśāsanampaṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi tammuṭaiya tarmma(m)māka tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉukku tiruviṭai Āṭṭam Āka
cantirakiri rācciyattil kīḻaippaṭai nāṭṭil vañcipākkam mallimālai celaikkūr pīmapuram Inta Ūrkaḷ ṉālum paṭaivīṭṭil cīmaiyil vāḷālmaṇkoṇṭāṉum Āka Inta Añcu Ūrum tām viṭukaiyil Inta Ūrkaḷil mutal ko
ṇṭu tammuṭaiya tarmmam Āka nāḷ vaḻi tiruveṅkaṭamuṭaiyāṉ Amutu ceytaruḷum canti muppatumappapaṭi Oṉṟum tirukkāṇāmaṭai Oṉṟum cukiyaṉ paṭi Oṉṟukkum śrīpaṇṭārattil viṭṭu potum malaikiniya niṉṟāṉ kālāl Amutupaṭi Oruva
ṭṭi patinālu marakkālum ney Amutu Eṭṭunāḻi Āḻākkum carkkarai Amutu Irunūṟṟu Oru patiṉ palamum payaṟṟu Amutu Eḻuṉāḻi mūvuḻakkum miḷaku Amutu Uḻakku Āḻākkuñ colakaiyum Uppamutu cīrakammutu teṅkāy Amutu tayiramutu kaṟiamutu nāḷ vaḻi vilai I
ṭṭuppokak kaṭavom Ākavum Amutu ceytaruḷina prasātattil viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu nālil Ōṉṟukku varum prasātam Ēḻaraiyum Appaprasātam patiṉmūṉṟum cukiyaṉ prasātampatiṉ mūṉṟum Akkāḷi prasātam nāḻiyum tammuṭaiya tarmmam Āka naṭa
kkiṟa cattratukku nāṅkaḷ toṉmaiyāka viṭṭuvarum prasātam Iraṇṭaraiyumappa prasātam nālum cukiyaṉ prasātam nālum Akkāḷi prasātam Uḻakkāḻākkum Āka prasātam pattum Appaprasātam patiṉ Eḻum cukiyaṉ prasātam patiṉ Ēḻum Akkā
ḷi prasātam nāḻi Uḻakku Āḻākkum Itil Astikiriaiyyaṉukku tammiṭa Irā[ja]sappaṭikku prasātam Oṉṟum Appa prasātam Oṉṟum cukiyaṉ prasātam Oṉṟum Akkāḷi prasātam Āḻākkum Avariṭa cantāṉa paramparai cantiṟātityavarai
naṭakkak kaṭavatākavum niṉṟa prasātam Oṉpatum Appa prasātam patiṉāṟum cukiyaṉ prasātam patiṉāṟum Akkāḷi prasātam ṉāḻi Uḻakkum Inta vakaippaṭi Uḷḷatu tamakku tarmmam Ākat tām kaṭṭuvitta tirukkopurat taruke meṟpaṭi
astikiriaiyyaṉ Atikkam Āka Iṭum catrattukku naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum Inta catrattukku mel veccattukku ṉāḷ vaḻi mūṉṟu paṇamum Araipala kaḷvaprasātamum patiṉeḻu pākkum patineḻu veṟṟi laiyum varukiṟa prasātam Eṭuttu poy kaṟikā
yum camaittiṭum brāmmaṇaṟku māsam Oṉṟukku Ilakkaikku paṇam paṉṉiraṇṭum śrī paṇṭārattil Inta vakaippaṭi kuṭuttu naṭattivarakkaṭavom Ākavum Ippaṭikku Inta cantiyum cattiṟamum cantiṟātityavarai nammuṭaiya santāṉa paramparai naṭa
ttippotakkaṭavom Ākavum niṉṟa prasātam Uḷḷatu pūrvvam Aṟṟa mariyātiyile celavaḻittuk koḷḷakkaṭavom Ākavum Ippaṭikku śrīvaiṣṇavarkaḷ paṇiyāl koyil kaṇakku tiruniṉṟaūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai śrīvaiyiṣṇava rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 17.275 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
